pom.xml.general_idea: Include the new quarkus-reactive module in the multi-module Maven build.

quarkus-services/cxf-client-service/pom..general_idea: Import the Quarkus CXF BOM to manage versions of CXF-related dependencies.
Add the core Quarkus CXF extension to enable SOAP client functionality.
Add the Quarkus CXF metrics feature extension to enable monitoring of SOAP operations.

quarkus-services/cxf-client-service/src/.general_idea: Configure Apache CXF client properties to connect to a remote SOAP calculator service.
Enable WSDL-to-Java code generation for the CXF client.
Define specific HTTP ports for the application and its tests.

quarkus-services/cxf-service/src/main/re.general_idea: Updated HTTP test and main ports to new values, likely to avoid conflicts or align with a new environment setup.
quarkus-services/cxf-service/src/main/re.human_impl: Changed quarkus.http.test-port from 8089 to 9089 and added quarkus.http.port=9000
